content.en:
Those nearby tribes didn't know how the Eagle Department killed Gu Tu, an emperor, and there were a few guesses.

For example, if He Lao's strength breaks through and kills Gu Tu, either the Eagle Department gives birth to a second emperor, or it unites other emperors.

Of course, if it is to unite with other emperor ranks, it will be the best result, otherwise the Eagle Department itself is so strong, that is what really makes them extremely afraid.

......

Eagle Ministry.

Since they exterminated the Worm Tribe, they have obtained the resources of the Worm Tribe, and many clansmen have been rewarded.

At this moment, Ye Tian was chatting with He Lao.

"Elder Tian, if you kill Gu Tu, he will have a secret method that will end up together, are you okay?"

He Lao asked.

"It's okay!" Ye Tian flickered: "I obtained a treasure in the ancient demon-level ruins of the Fox Yi Ancient Demon, and this treasure resisted the trick of the Gu Diagram, thus allowing me to survive!"

There is no loophole in what he said this, anyway, He Lao didn't know what he had obtained in the ancient demon-level ruins, he said this, He Lao would definitely believe it!

Really.

He Lao believed Ye Tian's statement.

"Fortunately, you chose a life-saving item in the ancient demon-level ruins, otherwise, you will die under the trick of the Gu map. A long time ago, an emperor of the Insect Department used this move to kill an emperor who was far more powerful than him, and shocked the emperor level of many tribes. However, this move is difficult to practice, once cultivated, there will be problems with the physical body, and there is no hope for the ancient demon level. It is precisely because of this secret method that I don't dare to trouble Gu Diagram. Unexpectedly, Gu Tu actually died in your hands, and Gu Tu himself estimated that he would never have imagined such an ending!"

He Lao said.

"Yes, I'm lucky, the Gu map is unlucky!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He Lao said again: "Elder Tian, you now have emperor-level combat power, and when you break through to the emperor-level, it is estimated that you will be invincible at the emperor-level." However, before you break through to the ancient demon level, don't expose your true strength, unless it's a last resort~. "

"Are you worried about the Golden God Department?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" He Lao nodded, "The Golden God Department is an incomparably powerful tribe, six Ancient Demon Level, but the tribe under the Golden God Department has never given birth to an Ancient Demon Level, and there are several emperor-level peaks with high potential, but then they disappeared. Some say they were killed by the Golden God Ministry, while others say they fled here. So, be careful. Ordinary emperor-level, the Golden God Department doesn't care, and is even too lazy to recruit, but if the emperor-level is invincible, if the Golden God Department is recruited, it will also find a way to control you, and it will definitely not let you break through to the ancient demon level, and will find a way to let you cultivate some secret methods to break through. It's like the secret method of the Insect Ministry, which actually came from the Golden God Ministry, which seems to be powerful, but it cuts off the hope of breaking through to the ancient demon level in the future. "

Ye Tian understood what He Lao meant, if he was an emperor, even if he was invincible, as long as he cut off the hope of breaking through, the Golden God Department would not care.

Otherwise, an emperor-level invincible existence, once it breaks through to the ancient demon level, it will indeed make the Golden God Department extremely fearful, and even surpass the Golden God Ministry, so that the Golden God Department will not be able to crush other tribes and lose the control of this area.

This is a situation that the Golden God Department cannot tolerate!

"It seems that this is true no matter what era it is!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He chatted with He Lao for a while, then left here and continued to guard the Dongmu River.

The last time he was attacked by Gu Tu was an accident, and it was impossible for an emperor to attack Dongmu River after that.

Therefore, he stayed in Dongmuhe to be more low-key.

......

In the years that followed, Ye Tian stayed in Dongmuhe very quietly to cultivate, and his physical body, ultimate rules, and ultimate will were steadily improving.

Moreover, through the domain field of that black stone, he also made some progress in the research of the realm of ultimate rules.

Of course, it is impossible to master the realm of the ultimate rules now.

Even in this era, it is a top-notch Ancient Demon-level existence that controls the Ultimate Rule Realm, how can it be so easy to master!

You must know that when he was the Ultimate Supreme Before, he didn't have a clue about the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Now, although he has a little clue, his cultivation is too low, he is only at the king level, and his thinking is incomparable to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, where can he realize the Ultimate Rule Realm so easily!

However, his current physical body is still steadily improving, and the ultimate rules are also steadily improving, and the speed of his strength improvement far exceeds that of other kings.

Time flies.

A long time has passed.

During this period, the Eagle Department used the resources of the Insect Department to give birth to three more kings, as well as a large number of generals, and the overall strength increased a lot.

And Ye Tian's strength has also improved a lot, much stronger than when he fought with Gu Tu at the beginning, if he uses his current strength to deal with Gu Tu, he can be killed in two moves.

In terms of cultivation, Ye Tian's current cultivation is equivalent to the middle of the king level, and he almost entered the high level.

"'~ The ascension of the physical body is still too slow, my physical body is already extremely powerful, and the life pattern is more perfect, but it is not easy to continue to improve the physical body on this basis, it requires a lot of resources, and the resources of the Eagle Department are still too few!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he had enough resources for him to cultivate, he might have raised the physical realm to the limit of the king level a long time ago, and he could go to the emperor realm.

However, Ye Tian can cultivate in a low-key manner, there is no danger, and he can develop steadily, which is very good.

He didn't pay attention to other things, so he practiced in such a low-key manner.

However, on this day, the ultimate particle (Dede Zhao) in the Void Demon Valley became violent, and the entire Void Demon Valley was shaking.

As soon as possible, a soldier reported the situation here to the clan.

Since He Lao couldn't leave the clan, he asked Ye Tian to go over and take a look, but told Ye Tian not to enter the Void Demon Valley, otherwise even if it was a sealed ancient demon level, it would be enough to burst out with the power to kill the emperor level.

Therefore, it would be dangerous to enter the Void Demon Valley.

Outside the Valley of the Void Demons.

Ye Tian came here, this was not the first time he had come here, but this time he felt a terrifying sense of crisis, which meant that the Void Demon Valley was an extremely dangerous place for him.

"The breath of that ancient demon-level creature has been transmitted, it seems that there is a problem with the seal!"

Ye Tian guessed.

So, he informed He Lao of this speculation, and He Lao informed the Golden God Ministry.

As for how the Golden God Ministry deals with it, it's not a matter of the Eagle Ministry.
